steps.name: fixture-vault-mixed
steps.summary: vault-mixed fixture: 9 md + 2 png + README, canary 배치 OK

steps.name: integration-pipeline-asserts
steps.blocked_reason: Step 0 fixture self-contradiction blocks assert 4. `packages/core/tests/fixtures/vault-mixed/public-with-image.md` (public) explicitly embeds `![[only-private.png]]`, yet the same step 0 manifest (and step 1 assert 4) require `only-private.png` to not be referenced by any public note. With the fixture as-shipped, `buildAttachmentClosure` correctly includes `only-private.png` (public-referenced, allowed extension) per the documented Phase C architecture — so assert 4 cannot pass without either (a) modifying the fixture (forbidden this step), or (b) adding a new private-attachment classification mechanism (out of step 1 scope; nothing in PRD/ADR/ARCHITECTURE defines one). 10 of 11 asserts pass; the 11th needs step 0 corrected first. Suggested step-0 fix: either remove the `![[only-private.png]]` line from `public-with-image.md`, or relocate `only-private.png` into `private/only-private.png` (the attachment walker can then be split to honor the forced `private/**` ignore while the note walker uses a relaxed copy for tripwire coverage).
